text: (NCR) is provided to artists wanting to experiment with or learn RenderMan in a bridge application.
These licenses are timed to expire every 120 days and can be renewed once the license expires.
To renew your license, visit the
and complete the survey as directed by the link in your LicenseApp.
Be sure you are logged into the forums before updating the license, this is how the system knows who you are and your available license options.
After completing the survey, you can re-open the
(as an Administrator or it cannot write the new license) in your bridge product to install the new license or
you can re-run the installer and upgrade to the latest version if you have not already with user permissions.
